provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human male cargo handler in his 30s with stubble and bags under his eyes from rotating shift cycles, wearing a faded charcoal shipboard thermal undersuit with integrated pressure seals at the wrists and neck showing fading at stress points and a heat-bonded repair patch on the left shoulder from hundreds of decon cycles, a reinforced cargo harness with magnetic tool clips and a battered handheld cargo scanner holstered at the hip, heavy mag-lock work boots with scuffed steel toes, a thin chain holding a laminated ship ID tag, a radiation dosimeter badge clipped to the chest
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.

assertions.rationale: Lighting reads correctly — warm upper-left with soft shadows
Palette is muted and dusty — no bright saturated colors
Full body, front-facing, plain background, correct fill
Colors muted and lived-in — no neon or bright saturated tones
Not generic sci-fi — reads as faction-specific and lived-in
